description: 38.7% throughput regression caused by missing scale factor in attention and 10x LR increase

ground_truth.root_cause: The einsum refactor in ScaledDotProductAttention removed the 1/sqrt(d_k) scaling factor, causing attention score explosion and degraded throughput. Additionally, the 10x learning rate multiplier destabilizes training.
ground_truth.recommended_fix: Restore the scale factor: divide einsum output by math.sqrt(d_k). Revert the learning rate multiplier in configure_optimizers.
